title: Operate quad bikes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate quad bikes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare a quad bike for operation

pcs.text: Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken and that the vehicle is fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken and that the vehicle is fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with supervisor activity to be undertaken and that the vehicle is fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment according to workplace safety requirements.

pcs.text: Use, wear and correctly fit personal protective equipment including quad bike helmet that is fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use, wear and correctly fit personal protective equipment including quad bike helmet that is fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use, wear and correctly fit personal protective equipment including quad bike helmet that is fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Conduct routine pre-operational checks on quad bike according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct routine pre-operational checks on quad bike according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct routine pre-operational checks on quad bike according to operation and maintenance manual and report faults or malfunctions to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify and confirm no go areas with supervisor according to workplace safety plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm no go areas with supervisor according to workplace safety plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm no go areas with supervisor according to workplace safety plan.

pcs.text: Identify quad bike applications, loads and fixed attachments according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify quad bike applications, loads and fixed attachments according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify quad bike applications, loads and fixed attachments according to operation and maintenance manual.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare a quad bike for operation

elements.title: Operate a quad bike

pcs.text: Start up, steer, manoeuvre, position and stop quad bike in a controlled manner
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Start up, steer, manoeuvre, position and stop quad bike in a controlled manner?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Start up, steer, manoeuvre, position and stop quad bike in a controlled manner.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and any biosecurity implications associated with quad bike operation and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and any biosecurity implications associated with quad bike operation and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and any biosecurity implications associated with quad bike operation and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Identify situations where quad bike active riding techniques are required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify situations where quad bike active riding techniques are required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify situations where quad bike active riding techniques are required.

pcs.text: Apply quad bike active riding techniques to pre-position the operators body to assist bike stability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply quad bike active riding techniques to pre-position the operators body to assist bike stability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply quad bike active riding techniques to pre-position the operators body to assist bike stability.

pcs.text: Identify and avoid riding surfaces, terrains and slopes that are dangerous to safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and avoid riding surfaces, terrains and slopes that are dangerous to safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and avoid riding surfaces, terrains and slopes that are dangerous to safe operation.

pcs.text: Operate and manoeuvre over a variety of surfaces, slopes and terrain safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate and manoeuvre over a variety of surfaces, slopes and terrain safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate and manoeuvre over a variety of surfaces, slopes and terrain safely.

pcs.text: Modify quad bike operation according to local weather conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Modify quad bike operation according to local weather conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Modify quad bike operation according to local weather conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Operate a quad bike

elements.title: Complete quad bike operation

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shut down quad bike?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shut down quad bike.

pcs.text: Park up and secure quad bike in line with workplace practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Park up and secure quad bike in line with workplace practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Park up and secure quad bike in line with workplace practices.

pcs.text: Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage to supervisor.

pcs.text: Remove and store keys in the required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and store keys in the required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and store keys in the required location.

pcs.text: Unload, load and secure quad bike safely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Unload, load and secure quad bike safely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Unload, load and secure quad bike safely.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete quad bike operation

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
